items.q: Name the movie that features the character Orson Welles.
items.explanation: Orson Welles is strongly linked to Citizen Kane.

items.q: The character Stanley Kubrick appears in Ran.
items.explanation: Stanley Kubrick appears in A Clockwork Orange, not Ran.

items.q: The character Jean-Pierre Jeunet appears in Amelie.
items.explanation: Jean-Pierre Jeunet is a key character in Amelie.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie The Third Man?
items.explanation: Carol Reed is one of the defining characters in The Third Man.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie In the Mood for Love?
items.explanation: Wong Kar-wai is one of the defining characters in In the Mood for Love.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Spirited Away?
items.explanation: Hayao Miyazaki is one of the defining characters in Spirited Away.

items.q: Which movie features the character Andrei Tarkovsky?
items.explanation: Andrei Tarkovsky is associated with Solaris.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Ingmar Bergman.
items.explanation: Ingmar Bergman is strongly linked to Persona.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Akira Kurosawa.
items.explanation: Akira Kurosawa is strongly linked to Ran.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Rashomon?
items.explanation: Akira Kurosawa is one of the defining characters in Rashomon.
